channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [TIINDIA] Tube Investments Board to Meet May 13 for FY26 Results, Dividend, NCDs
item.description:
Tube Investments of India Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for May 13, 2026. The agenda includes approving the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Board will also consider recommending a final dividend, if any, for FY26 and approving long-term borrowings through the issue of non-convertible debentures (NCDs) during FY 2026-27. The trading window for dealing in company shares will remain closed until May 15, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 13, 2026.
  • To approve Audited Standalone and Consolidated FY26 financial results.
  • To consider recommendation of final dividend for FY26.
  • To approve long-term borrowings via NCDs for FY2026-27.
  • Trading window closed until May 15, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tube Investments of India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RUBICON] Rubicon completes 85% stake acquisition in Arinna Lifesciences
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Rubicon Research Ltd has completed the secondary acquisition of an 85% stake in Arinna Lifesciences Limited on April 30, 2026. This follows an earlier intimation dated April 15, 2026, and was executed as per the terms of the Share Purchase Agreement. With the completion of this transaction, Arinna Lifesciences Limited is now a subsidiary of Rubicon Research Ltd.

  • Rubicon Research acquired an 85% stake in Arinna Lifesciences.
  • The acquisition was completed on April 30, 2026.
  • Arinna Lifesciences is now a subsidiary of Rubicon Research.
  • This expands Rubicon Research's business operations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rubicon Research Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [HUBTOWN] Hubtown to hold shareholder meeting for Saicharan merger on June 5, 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Hubtown Ltd will convene a meeting of its Equity Shareholders on Friday, June 05, 2026, at 11:00 A.M. (IST) via video conferencing. The purpose of the meeting is to consider and approve the proposed Scheme of Arrangement for the merger/amalgamation of Saicharan Consultancy Private Limited (Transferor Company) with Hubtown Limited (Transferee Company). This follows the Board's approval on February 14, 2025, and the National Company Law Tribunal's (NCLT) order dated April 09, 2026, directing the meeting. Shareholders will vote on the scheme, with May 29, 2026, as the cut-off date for voting eligibility.

  • Hubtown to hold equity shareholder meeting on June 5, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve merger of Saicharan Consultancy with Hubtown.
  • NCLT ordered the meeting for the proposed scheme of arrangement.
  • Meeting will be conducted via video conferencing/OAVM.
  • Cut-off date for determining voting eligibility is May 29, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HUBTOWN LTD. | Category: Merger

item.title: [PGHL] P&G Health to record ₹32 Cr profit from Mumbai property sale
item.description:
Procter & Gamble Health Ltd. announced the sale of certain immovable properties located in Mumbai. The company executed the indenture of sale on April 30, 2026. This strategic divestment is expected to result in a profit of approximately ₹32 Crores for the company. The disclosure was made in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • P&G Health sold immovable properties in Mumbai.
  • Transaction executed on April 30, 2026.
  • Company expects ₹32 Crores profit from sale.
  • This represents a divestment of assets.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Procter & Gamble Health Ltd | Category: Divestment

item.title: [SASKEN] Sasken: No funds raised in Q4 FY26; deviation statement not applicable
item.description:
Sasken Technologies Ltd has informed that it did not raise any funds through public issue, rights issue, further public offer, or preferential issue during the quarter ended March 31, 2026. Consequently, the statement of deviation(s) or variation(s) under Regulation 32 of SEBI (Listing and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, is not applicable to the company for this reporting period. The company also highlighted an issue with XBRL filing, as the system does not allow for NIL entries.

  • Sasken did not raise funds in Q4 FY26 via public or preferential issues.
  • Regulation 32 deviation statement is therefore not applicable.
  • No new capital infusion occurred during the quarter.
  • Company faced XBRL filing issue for NIL entry.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sasken Technologies Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [HARISH] Harish Textile Engineers receives legal notice for ₹15.04 Lacs dispute
item.description:
Harish Textile Engineers Ltd has received a Notice for Pre-Institution Mediation dated April 29, 2026, from the Mumbai District Legal Services Authority. The notice pertains to a commercial dispute filed by M/s. Steel-O-Fab Engineers, alleging non-payment of dues for goods/material supplied, amounting to approximately ₹15,04,295 along with interest. The Company and its Directors are required to attend mediation proceedings on May 8, 2026, at Dindoshi, Mumbai. The company states that the matter is currently at the pre-institution mediation stage and is being evaluated, with no material financial or operational impact reported at present.

  • Company received a legal notice for pre-institution mediation.
  • Dispute filed by M/s. Steel-O-Fab Engineers for alleged non-payment.
  • Amount in dispute is approximately ₹15.04 Lacs for goods supplied.
  • Mediation scheduled for May 8, 2026, in Dindoshi, Mumbai.
  • No material financial or operational impact reported at this stage.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Harish Textile Engineers Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [KSB] KSB Ltd: Price Waterhouse resigns, B S R & Co. LLP appointed auditor
item.description:
KSB Ltd submitted a revised intimation for its board meeting outcome, clarifying a previous error without changing financial results. The Board of Directors approved the Unaudited Financial Results (Consolidated and Standalone) for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. Furthermore, Price Waterhouse Chartered Accountants LLP resigned as statutory auditors, and the Board approved the appointment of B S R & Co. LLP as the new statutory auditors in a casual vacancy, subject to members' approval, for a five-year term.

  • Board approved Unaudited Financial Results for Q1 FY26.
  • Price Waterhouse Chartered Accountants LLP resigned as statutory auditor.
  • No concerns were raised by the resigning auditor.
  • B S R & Co. LLP appointed as new statutory auditor in casual vacancy.
  • New auditor's appointment is for five years, subject to AGM approval.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KSB Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [JYOTISTRUC] Jyoti Structures reports strong Q4 & FY26 results: Net Profit up 51.9% & 56.5%
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Jyoti Structures Limited (JSL) announced robust financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. For Q4 FY26, Total Income grew 44.2% to ₹240.76 Cr, EBITDA increased 58.6% to ₹23.70 Cr, and Net Profit rose 51.9% to ₹18.14 Cr. For the full year FY26, Total Income surged 53.1% to ₹772.44 Cr, EBITDA was up 58.0% to ₹69.97 Cr, and Net Profit jumped 56.5% to ₹56.04 Cr. The company attributed the strong performance to disciplined execution, effective cost management, and steady progress across its order book, driven by volume-led growth and improved productivity.

  • Q4 FY26 Total Income increased 44.2% to ₹240.76 Cr.
  • Q4 FY26 Net Profit grew 51.9% to ₹18.14 Cr.
  • FY26 Total Income rose 53.1% to ₹772.44 Cr.
  • FY26 Net Profit surged 56.5% to ₹56.04 Cr.
  • EBITDA for Q4 and FY26 saw significant increases of 58.6% and 58.0% respectively.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JYOTI STRUCTURES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [INDUSTOWER] Indus Towers Q4 PAT up 0.8% to ₹1,793 Cr; FY26 PAT down 28.1%
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Indus Towers Limited announced its audited consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended March 31, 2026. For Q4 FY26, consolidated revenue increased by 4.8% Y-o-Y to ₹8,101 Crores, EBITDA rose 1.6% Y-o-Y to ₹4,464 Crores, and Profit After Tax (PAT) was up 0.8% Y-o-Y to ₹1,793 Crores. The total tower base reached 264,514. For the full financial year FY26, consolidated revenues grew 7.9% Y-o-Y to ₹32,493 Crores. However, full-year EBITDA declined 13.8% Y-o-Y to ₹17,976 Crores, and PAT decreased 28.1% Y-o-Y to ₹7,145 Crores. The Board recommended a final dividend of ₹14 per share for FY26, citing healthy co-location additions and an improved operating environment.

  • Q4 FY26 consolidated revenue up 4.8% Y-o-Y to ₹8,101 Crores.
  • Q4 FY26 Profit After Tax increased 0.8% Y-o-Y to ₹1,793 Crores.
  • FY26 consolidated revenue grew 7.9% Y-o-Y to ₹32,493 Crores.
  • FY26 Profit After Tax declined 28.1% Y-o-Y to ₹7,145 Crores.
  • Board recommended final dividend of ₹14 per share for FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indus Towers Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [INDUSTOWER] Indus Towers Q4 & FY26 Audited Financial Results Released
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Indus Towers Ltd has officially released its Audited Financial Results for the fourth quarter (Q4) and the full financial year ended March 31, 2026. This report, filed in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, provides a comprehensive overview of the company's financial performance. It includes consolidated results, detailed financial highlights, summarized statements of operations and financial position, and operating highlights. The filing also features a management discussion and analysis, alongside supplemental disclosures concerning forward-looking statements, general investment risks, and the use of non-GAAP financial measures.

  • Indus Towers released audited Q4 and FY26 financial results.
  • Report details consolidated financials and operational performance.
  • Includes management discussion and analysis.
  • Contains disclosures on forward-looking statements and risks.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indus Towers Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
